tasks.description: Write a function that takes a list of integers and returns the sum of all even numbers in the list. Handle empty list (return 0).

Implement a CSV data processing pipeline. Read a CSV file with columns: name, age, score. Filter rows where score >= 50. Sort by score descending. Write output to a new CSV file. Handle empty input file.

Implement a directory synchronization tool that compares two directories (source and replica). Produce a report listing: files only in source, files only in replica, files that differ (by content). Support recursive comparison. Do not modify any files.
